message:
🌱 woodpecker-ci: Allow to change entrypoint / shell for ci step (#1699)

* 🌱 Add woodpecker-ci: Allow to change entrypoint / shell for ci step mission

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

Signed-off-by: andy anderson <andy@andys-MacBook-Pro.local>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,72 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "woodpecker-ci-278-allow-to-change-entrypoint-shell-for-ci-step",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "woodpecker-ci: Allow to change entrypoint / shell for ci step",
+    "description": "Allow to change entrypoint / shell for ci step. Requested by 19+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "open",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current woodpecker-ci deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your woodpecker-ci version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n woodpecker-ci -l app.kubernetes.io/name=woodpecker-ci\nhelm list -n woodpecker-ci 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working woodpecker-ci installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review woodpecker-ci configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant woodpecker-ci configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n woodpecker-ci -l app.kubernetes.io/name=woodpecker-ci\nkubectl get configmap -n woodpecker-ci -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=woodpecker-ci\n```\nCurrently `/bin/sh` is used as entrypoint for every ci step. If an image does not contain `/bin/sh` it can not be used with woodpecker ATM. For example `gcr.io/kaniko-project/executor:debug` only ships with `/bin/busybox`."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Allow to change entrypoint / shell for ci step",
+        "description": "This feature requires changes to the Woodpecker CI pipeline backend to allow configuring the entrypoint and shell per step. See the source issue for community-proposed approaches and the latest status."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n woodpecker-ci -l app.kubernetes.io/name=woodpecker-ci\nkubectl get events -n woodpecker-ci --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"Allow to change entrypoint / shell for ci step\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "This issue requests the ability to configure the entrypoint and shell for CI steps. Currently /bin/sh is hardcoded, preventing use of images without /bin/sh (e.g., kaniko). A configurable shell/entrypoint per step would resolve this.",
+      "codeSnippets": []
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "woodpecker-ci",
+      "community",
+      "ci-cd",
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "woodpecker-ci"
+    ],

+    "difficulty": "intermediate",

+      "feature"
+    ],

+      "issue": "https://github.com/woodpecker-ci/woodpecker/issues/278",

+    },
+    "reactions": 19,
+    "comments": 6,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",
+    "tools": [
+      "kubectl"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Kubernetes cluster with woodpecker-ci installed or the issue environment reproducible."
+  },
